title: Elizabeth Goodspeed on why graphic designers can’t stop joking about hating their jobs
annotation: Elizabeth Goodspeed on why graphic designers cant stop joking about hating their jobs

og.title: Elizabeth Goodspeed on why graphic designers can’t stop joking about hating their jobs
og.description: Designers are burnt out, disillusioned, and constantly joking that design ruined their life – but underneath the memes lies a deeper reckoning. Our US editor-at-large explores how irony became the industry’s dominant tone, and what it might mean to care again.
